semantic.role: Public API facade aggregating and re-exporting prompt template schemas, rendering blocks, and example data.
responsibilities: Centralizes exports of JSON schemas for ArchSpine document types (source file, document, config, folder, project).
Centralizes exports of prompt block rendering functions for identity, instructions, context, environment, rule violation checks, git intent, JSON schema, and source content.
Centralizes exports of example data for source role definitions.
Provides a single import point for downstream prompt generation modules.
outOfScope: Handling user input or API requests.
invariants: Exports only symbols imported from './schemas.js', './blocks.js', and './examples.js'.
Does not contain any business logic or transformations.
Serves as a pure re-export aggregation point.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a consolidated public interface for prompt generation resources to reduce import complexity.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No changes detected in this file; recent commit 'restore llm-authored markdown generation' does not affect this facade.
